top_signals.title: Applied Aerospace & Defense Said to Raise $650 Million in US IPO
top_signals.summary: Applied Aerospace & Defense Inc., a space and defense engineering firm, raised $650 million in an initial public offering, according to a person familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Aya logs bonanza silver hits at Zgounder mine in Morocco
top_signals.summary: Zgounder is one of the world’s few silver-only operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
